title: FirstEnergy Corp. Declares Increased Common Stock Dividend of 46.5 Cents Per Share
author: Prnewswire
description: FirstEnergy Corp. announced a 4.5% increase in its quarterly dividend to 46.5 cents per share, payable June 1, 2026. The 2026 annual dividend rate is expected to be $1.86 per share, up from $1.78 in 2025, reflecting the company's successful business strategy execution and long-term transformation focused on electric system reliability and resiliency.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company declared a 4.5% increase in quarterly dividend, demonstrating confidence in its financial performance and ability to deliver shareholder value. The dividend increase aligns with the company's targeted payout ratio of 60-70% of Core Earnings, and management expressed confidence in continued value delivery to customers, communities, and investors based on successful strategy execution over the past three years.

title: FirstEnergy Corp. Declares Common Stock Dividend of 44.5 Cents Per Share
author: Prnewswire
description: FirstEnergy Corp. announced a quarterly dividend of 44.5 cents per share, payable on March 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 6, 2026. The company serves over 6 million customers across six states and operates approximately 24,000 miles of transmission lines.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The announcement is a standard quarterly dividend declaration with no significant positive or negative indicators. The company provides routine financial information about its dividend distribution and operational overview.

title: FirstEnergy Corp. Declares Common Stock Dividend of 44.5 Cents Per Share
author: Prnewswire
description: FirstEnergy Corp. announced a quarterly dividend of 44.5 cents per share, payable on December 1, 2025, to shareholders of record as of November 7, 2025. The company serves over six million customers across six states and operates approximately 24,000 miles of transmission lines.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is maintaining its regular dividend payment, indicating stable financial performance without significant positive or negative signals. The forward-looking statements suggest potential risks and uncertainties, but the dividend declaration itself is a routine corporate action.

title: FirstEnergy Corp. Declares Common Stock Dividend of $0.445 Per Share
author: Prnewswire
description: FirstEnergy Corp. announced a quarterly dividend of $0.445 per share, payable on September 1, 2025, representing an annual dividend rate of $1.78 per share and an increase of over 11% since 2023.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company is increasing annual dividend, demonstrating financial stability and commitment to shareholders, with dividend growing over 11% since 2023

title: FirstEnergy Corp. Declares Increased Quarterly Common Stock Dividend of $0.445 Per Share
author: Prnewswire
description: FirstEnergy Corp. has declared an increased quarterly common stock dividend of $0.445 per share, representing an annual rate of $1.78 per share, pending continued Board approval. This compares to $1.70 per share in 2024 declared dividends, an increase of more than 11%.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company has increased its quarterly common stock dividend, reflecting its commitment to delivering shareholder value and its target payout ratio of 60 to 70 percent of Core (non-GAAP) earnings.
